Polygon Open Money Stack (OMS)

The enterprise-ready stack for regulated on-ramps, compliant wallets, and blockchain settlement. Get early access

OMS Solutions
Polygon Chain

The go-to settlement layer to move money globally

Crosschain Interop

1-click cross-chain transactions

Wallet Infrastructure

Seamless enterprise-grade wallets for any use case

On-/Off- Ramps

On- and off-ramps for fiat and physical cash

Polygon CDK

Multistack toolkit for building ZK-powered, high-performance chains

Polygon Agglayer

Cross-chain settlement layer unifying liquidity and users of any blockchain for interoperability and growth

Polygon Vaultbridge

Turns TVL into sustainable, chain-native revenue

Cross-border payments

Instant, stablecoin-powered cross-border settlement. No correspondent banks, no delays.

Tokenization & RWAs

Bring real-world assets onchain with compliant, programmable infrastructure.

Stablecoin Commerce

Accept and settle in stablecoins globally. No FX risk, no intermediaries.

Global Payroll

Pay anyone, anywhere. Settle in stablecoins, arrive in local currency.

Treasury management

Stablecoin-native treasury rails. Real-time visibility, zero intermediaries.

Dollar access

Give users in any market access to dollar accounts and stablecoins.

one-click wallet creation to give your users an onchain account

Wallet Infrastructure

one-click wallet creation to give your users an onchain account

The Polygon Chain is fast, low cost, and battle-tested. Live for five years, with 99.99% uptime and millions of users, this is the best place to build onchain.

BENEFITS

       Polygon is purpose-built to scale money

Reliability

01
7B+ transactions. 99.99% uptime. 0 hours waiting in line at a bank.

SPEED

02
Polygon settles instantly-yes, even on Sundays. Fast finality has never felt so good.

Enterprise ready

04
Wallets? Yes. Onramps? Covered. Compliance-ready? Absolutely. Everything you need is already here.

Distribution

05
You don’t need to find liquidity and users. 156 million active addresses are already doing business on Polygon.

COST

03
Pay $0.002 to settle onchain. Keep the other $34.998. Wire transfer fee has left the chat.

Liquidity

06
Tap into billions in stablecoins and every major asset on a deeply liquid chain.

WHAT POLYGON CAN DO FOR YOU
01
EXPLORE

Payments

PAYMENTS

When moving money is part of your product, you can’t afford wires, wait times, or weekend breaks. On Polygon, payments never hit pause.

02

Stablecoins

EXPLORE
Stablecoins

Call us stable. That’s the point. The most trusted stablecoins run on Polygon—$3.4B+ in liquidity, full reserve coverage, and the global distribution banks wish they had.

03

RWA

EXPLORE
RWA

You wouldn’t sell a Van Gogh on Facebook Marketplace. Tokenized assets belong on rails with reputation. Polygon delivers trust, distribution, and infrastructure that’s already proven.

04

DeFi

EXPLORE
DEFI

Borrow with tokenized credit. Swap across borders. Plug into liquidity that doesn’t sleep. If your product needs DeFi, Polygon already has the parts.
